name: @liendev/parser-native
description: Prebuilt native tree-sitter parser bindings for Lien (napi-rs)

scripts.build: echo '@liendev/parser-native: no JS build step -- run "build:native" to compile the Rust crate'
scripts.build:native: node scripts/fetch-vendor.mjs && cargo build --release && node scripts/copy-binary.mjs
scripts.typecheck: echo '@liendev/parser-native: hand-written index.d.ts, no typecheck step'

author: Alf Henderson
